# defectdojo_asset_group (Data Source)

Data source for DefectDojo Asset Group

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_asset_group" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `asset` (Number) The ID of the Asset.
- `group` (Number) The ID of the Group.
- `role` (Number) The ID of the Role.
